sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT toUInt32OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'UInt32')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = '100' WHERE value = 'abc';
SELECT value, toUInt32OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'UInt32')) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '0%';
